metadata.description: Skills marketplace for Claude Code and other AI agents

plugins.name: clipboard
plugins.description: Copy core content of the last answer to the macOS clipboard via pbcopy. Supports plain text and Slack rich text.

plugins.name: commit-all-the-things
plugins.description: Commit all uncommitted changes in the working tree, grouped into logical commits with descriptive messages.

plugins.name: dont-do-that
plugins.description: Guardrail hooks that push back on common AI reflexes: shifting blame, stopping prematurely, delegating verification, asking for confirmation when none was needed, and em-dashes in prose.

plugins.name: export-skill
plugins.description: Export and sanitize a skill for sharing, stripping PII and checking for security issues. Supports translation and platform porting.

plugins.name: eye-of-the-beholder
plugins.description: Visual layout review skill. Observation before explanation: screenshot, describe what you see, then diagnose. Design-TDD for CSS.

plugins.name: ground
plugins.description: Verify Claude's recent output with external sources when the user expresses skepticism. Ad-hoc retrieval-augmented verification.

plugins.name: gurus
plugins.description: Opinionated code review panel with 8 expert perspectives (Beck, Fowler, Uncle Bob, DHH, Metz, Lutke, Hickey, Thoughtbot).

plugins.name: inspiratie
plugins.description: Online research workflow for unfamiliar topics, design decisions, and evaluating approaches. Dutch-language skill.

plugins.name: rebase-latest-default
plugins.description: Rebase current branch on the latest default branch (local or remote) with staleness check and automatic conflict resolution.

plugins.name: recap
plugins.description: Structured status overview of the current session: what we're doing, where we are, what's next.

plugins.name: recursion
plugins.description: Daily deep research producing atomic improvement plans for the Claude Code workflow. Research machine, not executor.

plugins.name: rename-suggestion
plugins.description: Generate a descriptive session name based on conversation context and copy the rename command to clipboard.

plugins.name: saysay
plugins.description: Speech mode via macOS say command. Claude speaks output aloud after every response, translating screen content to spoken language.

plugins.name: screen-recording
plugins.description: Automated screen recordings and demo videos of browser-based features using Playwright video recording.

plugins.name: self-improvement
plugins.description: Update CLAUDE.md and skills based on user feedback. Detects duplication, determines optimal location, extracts large sections into skills.

plugins.name: testing-philosophy
plugins.description: TDD principles, Cucumber/Gherkin conventions, flaky test handling, and test suite health. Red-Green-Refactor workflow.

plugins.name: whywhy
plugins.description: Drill N layers deep into a question or goal (default 7). Claude autonomously asks and answers 'why?' N times, then analyzes the chain for a better direction.

plugins.name: how-plugins-work
plugins.description: Explains how Claude Code plugin naming, skill resolution, and the plugin:skill invocation pattern work in practice.
